hero.subtitle: A unified, AI-driven platform for schools, companies and authorities. Maximize pedagogical impact and minimize administration around the clock.

features.title: Everything you need for modern education
features.subtitle: From AI-driven analysis to gamification and administration. Everything gathered in one powerful platform.

multi_tenancy.title: Multi-Tenancy
multi_tenancy.desc: Isolated data for each school with infinite scalability.

b2b.title: B2B Admin Console
b2b.desc: Manage users, courses and licenses smoothly remotely.

microservice.title: Microservices
microservice.desc: Built with Spring Boot for maximum performance and stability.

event_bus.title: Real-time Event-Bus
event_bus.desc: Immediate notification and synchronization between all modules.

gamification.title: Game Engine
gamification.desc: XP, Badges and Leaderboards that motivate learning.

ai_creator.title: AI Course Creator
ai_creator.desc: Auto-generate entire courses from PDF or link in 60 sec.

pwa.title: PWA Mobile App
pwa.desc: Install EduFlex directly on your mobile without an app store.

live_video.title: Live Video & Chat
live_video.desc: Integrated Zoom/Teams support for digital classrooms.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Editing
collaborative.desc: Edit documents together in real-time through OnlyOffice.

roi.title: Pedagogical ROI
roi.desc: Measure exactly how much time and resources you save daily.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.desc: Contextual push notifications for deadlines and feedback.

exams.title: Secure Exams
exams.desc: Monitored environment with focus control and integrity protection.

integrations.title: LTI 1.3 Advantage
integrations.desc: Fully compatible with Canvas, Moodle and Blackboard.

compliance.title: WCAG Compliance
compliance.desc: Designed for 100% accessibility regardless of prerequisites.

pii.title: GDPR Zero-Trust
pii.desc: Breakthrough PII masking of all sensitive student data.

educareer.title: EduCareer Roadmap
educareer.desc: AI-driven career paths to reach the student's dream goal.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard 2.0
admin.desc: Total control over the organization with live data and widgets.

teacher.title: Teacher Panel
teacher.desc: Effective overview of students' attendance, progress, and submissions.

quiz.title: AI Quiz Generator
quiz.desc: Upload documents and let AI create test questions in seconds.

library.title: E-book Library
library.desc: A central library for literature with a built-in reader.

catalog.title: Course Catalog
catalog.desc: Visual and filterable catalog for students to find new courses.

resource.title: Resource Bank & Community
resource.desc: Share and download material from a common Community library.

analytics.title: Analytics & Insights
analytics.desc: Real-time dashboards for principals and teachers. Heatmaps and dropout prediction.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: Role-based access control (RBAC), audit logging, and secure Keycloak SSO integration.

evaluation_system.title: Course Evaluation & Insights
evaluation_system.desc: Complete system for course quality. Automatic student notifications and AI analysis of free-text responses to measure the ROI of education.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that suits your school.

pricing_page.title: Simple & Fair {{gradient}}
pricing_page.subtitle: Choose the level that best suits your organization. No hidden fees, just pure pedagogical power.
pricing_page.security_desc: All data is stored within the EU (Sweden/Germany). We follow the strictest requirements for PII masking and privacy by design.
pricing_page.availability_desc: Our Kubernetes architecture guarantees 99.9% uptime for Enterprise. The system scales automatically based on the number of users.
pricing_page.onboarding_desc: We help you with SIS integration, LTI setup and teacher training to ensure a successful pilot period.
pricing_page.custom_title: Do you need a tailor-made setup?
pricing_page.custom_subtitle: For larger corporations or specific pedagogical needs, we offer tailor-made ENTERPRISE packages.

basic.desc: Perfect for smaller schools or associations that want to digitize their administration.

pro.desc: The intelligent level for modern education providers with AI support.

enterprise.desc: Full-scale solution for corporations and authorities with high demands on control.

footer.tagline: Empowering education with modern technology. Built with ❤️ in Sweden.
footer.newsletter_desc: Get the latest updates on AI and education directly in your inbox.

roles.title: Adapted for your role in the school
roles.subtitle: EduFlex is designed to facilitate everyday life for all stakeholders in education.

rector.title: Principal & School Management
rector.desc: Gain full control over operations with real-time data and strategic decision support.

teacher.title: Teachers & Mentors
teacher.desc: Reduce administration and focus on pedagogy with world-class AI support.

student.title: Pupils & Students
student.desc: Engaging learning environment with gamification and personal AI support around the clock.

parent.title: Guardians
parent.desc: Stay updated on your child's progress and communicate directly with the school.

cta.title: Are you ready to truly digitize your school?
cta.subtitle: Join 500+ other users and experience the future of LLP with EduAI Hub.

features_page.intro_badge: Everything you need for modern education
features_page.title: Packed with features
features_page.subtitle: From AI-driven analysis to gamification and administration. Here you will find everything that makes EduFlex unique.

ai_creator.title: AI Course Creator
ai_creator.desc: Create complete courses from PDF documents in under 60 seconds. Auto-generated lessons, dates, and smart codes with built-in database synchronization.

predictive.title: Predictive AI Analysis
predictive.desc: Identify at-risk students before it's too late. AI analyzes behavior patterns and provides teachers with decision support and students with personalized study tips.

lti.title: LTI 1.3 Advantage
lti.desc: Fully verified support for AGS (Grades) and NRPS (Roles/Names). Seamless integration with Canvas, Moodle, and Blackboard for secure authentication and data exchange.

xapi.title: xAPI & CMI5 LRS
xapi.desc: Next generation tracking. Run simulations and offline mobile courses with full detail reporting via our built-in Learning Record Store.

minio.title: MinIO & S3 Storage
minio.desc: Scalable Enterprise storage. All media (audiobooks, video) is streamed lightning fast with support for playback where you left off.

edugame.title: EduGame Engine
edugame.desc: XP system, Shop, Profile themes, daily challenges, and streaks. Turn learning into an adventure.

schema.title: Schema-per-Tenant
schema.desc: True multi-tenancy with complete data isolation. Each organization automatically gets its own PostgreSQL schema.

resource.title: Resource Bank & Community
resource.desc: A unified library for all your quizzes, assignments, and lessons. Share and import material from other teachers with one click.

cascading.title: Cascading Deletes
cascading.desc: Maintenance-free management. When you delete a course, all associated material and lessons are automatically deleted without database conflicts.

sso.title: Enterprise SSO
sso.desc: Keycloak integration with OAuth2/OIDC. Full control over identities and access levels in the organization.

slugs.title: Friendly URLs (Slugs)
slugs.desc: Search engine friendly and readable addresses for all courses. Navigate via readable names instead of technical IDs.

quiz_gen.title: Quiz Generator
quiz_gen.desc: Randomize quizzes automatically from your question bank (Math, Java, Swedish, etc.) for quick knowledge checks without manual work.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: Full AES-256 GCM encryption of sensitive data, domain-locked licensing, and rate-limiting protects your organization 24/7.

insights.title: Course Evaluation & Insights
insights.desc: Complete system for course quality, automated student notifications, and AI analysis of free-text responses to measure ROI.

social.title: Contextual Social Learning
social.desc: Discuss lessons and courses in real-time directly in the player. Learn from your peers through threaded conversations and real-time notifications.

streaks.title: Milestone Streaks
streaks.desc: Continue your "Learning Streak" and unlock exclusive XP bonuses and badges. Centralized tracking that motivates you every day.

mission_control.title: Principal Package (Mission Control)
mission_control.desc: Complete school management layer with real-time KPIs. Manage organizational hierarchy (Department, Program, Class), see aggregated statistics, and handle incidents in a unified, live view.

health.title: Secure Student Health
health.desc: Role-based access control and encrypted records for maximum confidentiality and security.

ai_analysis.title: Predictive AI Analysis 2.0
ai_analysis.desc: Identifies students in the risk zone before they know it themselves. Deep learning pattern analysis of attendance, activity, and results.

skolverket.title: Skolverket Sync 2.0
skolverket.desc: Seamless integration with the entire Skolverket course catalog. Automated updating of course objectives and grading criteria.

pwa.title: Native PWA Experience
pwa.desc: Install EduFlex directly on the home screen. Full support for offline access and lightning-fast response on all devices.

gamification_expansion.title: Gamification Expansion
gamification_expansion.desc: New Quest systems, Social-hub, and expanded Shop. Increase engagement through meaningful gamified learning.

guardian.title: Guardian & Health Control
guardian.desc: Guardian portal, digital sick leave reporting, and student health surveys. All collected with AES-256 encryption and privacy guards for secure data handling.

ai_center.title: EduAI Center 2.1
ai_center.desc: Advanced Spaced Repetition with SM-2 algorithm. Earn AI credits through intelligent repetitions and visualize your knowledge journey in real time.

fields.time_info: Students have this time to complete the exam once they have started.
fields.security_info: When you create an "Exam", integrity monitoring is automatically activated. This means that window changes are logged and the student must stay in exam mode.
fields.channel_info: The system filters out channels that the student has opted out of in their profile.
